name: Memory Match
description: Flip cards to find matching pairs. Three difficulty levels, move counter, timer, and star rating. Match all pairs in the fewest moves to earn three stars!
author: Novalystrix

contributions.Elanor: UI layout consultation — grid-based card layout approach
contributions.Míriel: Visual theme direction — gradient card backs, particle burst animations on match
contributions.Narvi: Game logic review — board lock during match check, edge case handling

features: Particle burst effects on successful matches
Star rating system based on efficiency
